headline: How The NetApp (NTAP) Story Is Shifting With Flash Growth And Margin Concerns
summary: NetApp’s latest valuation work keeps the core fair value estimate steady at US$117.93, while recent Street price targets span roughly US$88 to US$120 and include a fresh initiation at US$128. That spread lines up with current analyst debate, where some see long term upside tied to flash and public cloud growth and others focus on margin pressure and higher memory costs when trimming targets toward the high US$80s to low US$110s. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting targets...

headline: NetApp (NTAP) Brings Elastio and Commvault on Board for Security
summary: NetApp, Inc. (NASDAQ:NTAP) is among the best performing cybersecurity stocks in 2025. On March 24, NetApp, Inc. (NASDAQ:NTAP) announced a deal with Elastio to bolster the security capabilities of its ransomware protection service. This arrangement will involve embedding certain Elastio features into the NetApp Ransomware Resilience Service. With this integration, NetApp aims to help enterprises […]

headline: NetApp & Nutanix Partner to Advance Hybrid Cloud & Virtualization
summary: NTAP teams up with Nutanix to integrate ONTAP with NCP, aiming to streamline hybrid cloud, boost virtualization efficiency and enable seamless data mobility.

raw.headline: NetApp & Nutanix Partner to Advance Hybrid Cloud & Virtualization

headline: New Research Finds AI Is Now Foundational to Modern Marketing
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif. & SAN FRANCISCO, April 08, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced its participation in a new marketing research study conducted by Callan Consulting, a Silicon Valley executive marketing consulting firm, joining 18 B2B and B2C technology companies to examine how AI is reshaping modern marketing organizations, marking a clear shift from early experimentation to embedded, enterprise‑wide adoption.

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 We Avoid
summary: Even if a company is profitable, it doesn’t always mean it’s a great investment. Some struggle to maintain growth, face looming threats, or fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their future potential.

summary: Nutanix (NASDAQ:NTNX) used its 2026 Investor Day—held alongside its .NEXT user conference—to outline product initiatives, partner announcements, and medium-term financial targets, while also addressing customer trends ranging from agentic AI to supply chain constraints.
